001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.utils;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023
024/**
025 * Utility methods for argument validation and assertion.
026 *
027 * <p>
028 * This class provides static utility methods for validating method arguments and throwing
029 * {@link IllegalArgumentException} when validation fails. These methods are designed to
030 * simplify common parameter validation patterns and provide consistent error messages.
031 *
032 * <h5 class='section'>Features:</h5>
033 * <ul>
034 *   <li><b>Null checking:</b> Validate single or multiple arguments are not null
035 *   <li><b>Boolean expressions:</b> Assert arbitrary boolean conditions with custom messages
036 *   <li><b>String validation:</b> Check for null or blank strings
037 *   <li><b>Type checking:</b> Validate class array types
038 * </ul>
039 *
040 * <h5 class='section'>Usage:</h5>
041 * <p class='bjava'>
042 *   <jk>import static</jk> org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
043 *
044 *   <jk>public</jk> <jk>void</jk> setFooBar(String <jv>foo</jv>, String <jv>bar</jv>) {
045 *       <jc>// Validate multiple arguments at once</jc>
046 *       <jsm>assertArgsNotNull</jsm>(<js>"foo"</js>, <jv>foo</jv>, <js>"bar"</js>, <jv>bar</jv>);
047 *
048 *       <jc>// Validate custom condition</jc>
049 *       <jsm>assertArg</jsm>(<jv>foo</jv>.length() &gt; 0, <js>"Foo cannot be empty"</js>);
050 *   }
051 * </p>
052 *
053 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5>
054 * <ul>
055 *   <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href='../../../../../index.html#juneau-commons.utils'>Overview &gt; juneau-commons.utils</a>
056 * </ul>
057 */
058@SuppressWarnings({
059   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
060})
061public class AssertionUtils {
062
063   /**
064    * Prevents instantiation.
065    */
066   private AssertionUtils() {}
067
068   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
069   private static final String ARG_type = "type";
070   private static final String ARG_o = "o";
071
072   /**
073    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if the specified expression is <jk>false</jk>.
074    *
075    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
076    * <p class='bjava'>
077    *    <jk>import static</jk> org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
078    *
079    * <jk>public</jk> String setFoo(List&lt;String&gt; <jv>foo</jv>) {
080    *    <jsm>assertArg</jsm>(<jv>foo</jv> != <jk>null</jk> &amp;&amp; ! <jv>foo</jv>.isEmpty(), <js>"'foo' cannot be null or empty."</js>);
081    *    ...
082    * }
083    * </p>
084    *
085    * @param expression The boolean expression to check.
086    * @param msg The exception message.
087    * @param args The exception message args.
088    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Constructed exception.
089    */
090   public static final void assertArg(boolean expression, String msg, Object...args) throws IllegalArgumentException {
091      if (! expression)
092         throw illegalArg(msg, args);
093   }
094
095   /**
096    * Asserts that the given expression is <c>true</c>, throwing an {@link IllegalStateException} if it's not.
097    *
098    * <p>
099    * This method is similar to {@link #assertArg(boolean, String, Object...)} but throws an
100    * {@link IllegalStateException} instead of an {@link IllegalArgumentException}, making it suitable
101    * for state validation rather than argument validation.
102    *
103    * @param expression The expression to test.
104    * @param msg The error message format string.
105    * @param args The arguments for the error message format string.
106    * @throws IllegalStateException if the expression is <c>false</c>.
107    */
108   public static final void assertState(boolean expression, String msg, Object...args) throws IllegalStateException {
109      if (! expression)
110         throw illegalState(msg, args);
111   }
112
113   /**
114    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if the specified argument is <jk>null</jk>.
115    *
116    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
117    * <p class='bjava'>
118    *    <jk>import static</jk> org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
119    *
120    * <jk>public</jk> String setFoo(String <jv>foo</jv>) {
121    *    <jsm>assertArgNotNull</jsm>(<js>"foo"</js>, <jv>foo</jv>);
122    *    ...
123    * }
124    * </p>
125    *
126    * @param <T> The argument data type.
127    * @param name The argument name.
128    * @param o The object to check.
129    * @return The same argument.
130    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Constructed exception.
131    */
132   public static final <T> T assertArgNotNull(String name, T o) throws IllegalArgumentException {
133      assertArg(o != null, "Argument ''{0}'' cannot be null.", name);
134      return o;
135   }
136
137   /**
138    * Asserts that the specified object is not <jk>null</jk>, throwing an {@link IllegalStateException} if it is.
139    *
140    * @param <T> The type of the object.
141    * @param o The object to check. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
142    * @param msg The error message format string. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
143    * @param args The arguments for the message format string.
144    * @return The non-null object.
145    * @throws IllegalStateException If the object is <jk>null</jk>.
146    */
147   public static final <T> T assertNotNull(T o, String msg, Object...args) throws IllegalStateException {
148      if (o == null)
149         throw illegalState(msg, args);
150      return o;
151   }
152
153   /**
154    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if the specified string is <jk>null</jk> or blank.
155    *
156    * @param name The argument name.
157    * @param o The object to check.
158    * @return The same object.
159    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Thrown if the specified string is <jk>null</jk> or blank.
160    */
161   public static final String assertArgNotNullOrBlank(String name, String o) throws IllegalArgumentException {
162      assertArgNotNull(name, o);
163      assertArg(! o.isBlank(), "Argument ''{0}'' cannot be blank.", name);
164      return o;
165   }
166
167   /**
168    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if any of the specified arguments are <jk>null</jk>.
169    *
170    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
171    * <p class='bjava'>
172    *    <jk>import static</jk> org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
173    *
174    * <jk>public</jk> String setFooBar(String <jv>foo</jv>, String <jv>bar</jv>) {
175    *    <jsm>assertArgsNotNull</jsm>(<js>"foo"</js>, <jv>foo</jv>, <js>"bar"</js>, <jv>bar</jv>);
176    *    ...
177    * }
178    * </p>
179    *
180    * @param name1 The first argument name.
181    * @param o1 The first object to check.
182    * @param name2 The second argument name.
183    * @param o2 The second object to check.
184    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Constructed exception.
185    */
186   public static final void assertArgsNotNull(String name1, Object o1, String name2, Object o2) throws IllegalArgumentException {
187      assertArgNotNull(name1, o1);
188      assertArgNotNull(name2, o2);
189   }
190
191   /**
192    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if any of the specified arguments are <jk>null</jk>.
193    *
194    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
195    * <p class='bjava'>
196    *    <jk>import static</jk> org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
197    *
198    * <jk>public</jk> String setFooBarBaz(String <jv>foo</jv>, String <jv>bar</jv>, String <jv>baz</jv>) {
199    *    <jsm>assertArgsNotNull</jsm>(<js>"foo"</js>, <jv>foo</jv>, <js>"bar"</js>, <jv>bar</jv>, <js>"baz"</js>, <jv>baz</jv>);
200    *    ...
201    * }
202    * </p>
203    *
204    * @param name1 The first argument name.
205    * @param o1 The first object to check.
206    * @param name2 The second argument name.
207    * @param o2 The second object to check.
208    * @param name3 The third argument name.
209    * @param o3 The third object to check.
210    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Constructed exception.
211    */
212   public static final void assertArgsNotNull(String name1, Object o1, String name2, Object o2, String name3, Object o3) throws IllegalArgumentException {
213      assertArgNotNull(name1, o1);
214      assertArgNotNull(name2, o2);
215      assertArgNotNull(name3, o3);
216   }
217
218   /**
219    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if any of the specified arguments are <jk>null</jk>.
220    *
221    * @param name1 The first argument name.
222    * @param o1 The first object to check.
223    * @param name2 The second argument name.
224    * @param o2 The second object to check.
225    * @param name3 The third argument name.
226    * @param o3 The third object to check.
227    * @param name4 The fourth argument name.
228    * @param o4 The fourth object to check.
229    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Constructed exception.
230    */
231   @SuppressWarnings({
232      "java:S107" // 8 parameters needed for argument validation
233   })
234   public static final void assertArgsNotNull(String name1, Object o1, String name2, Object o2, String name3, Object o3, String name4, Object o4) throws IllegalArgumentException {
235      assertArgNotNull(name1, o1);
236      assertArgNotNull(name2, o2);
237      assertArgNotNull(name3, o3);
238      assertArgNotNull(name4, o4);
239   }
240
241   /**
242    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if any of the specified arguments are <jk>null</jk>.
243    *
244    * @param name1 The first argument name.
245    * @param o1 The first object to check.
246    * @param name2 The second argument name.
247    * @param o2 The second object to check.
248    * @param name3 The third argument name.
249    * @param o3 The third object to check.
250    * @param name4 The fourth argument name.
251    * @param o4 The fourth object to check.
252    * @param name5 The fifth argument name.
253    * @param o5 The fifth object to check.
254    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Constructed exception.
255    */
256   @SuppressWarnings({
257      "java:S107" // 10 parameters needed for argument validation
258   })
259   public static final void assertArgsNotNull(String name1, Object o1, String name2, Object o2, String name3, Object o3, String name4, Object o4, String name5, Object o5)
260      throws IllegalArgumentException {
261      assertArgNotNull(name1, o1);
262      assertArgNotNull(name2, o2);
263      assertArgNotNull(name3, o3);
264      assertArgNotNull(name4, o4);
265      assertArgNotNull(name5, o5);
266   }
267
268   /**
269    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if the specified object is not an instance of the specified type.
270    *
271    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
272    * <p class='bjava'>
273    *    <jk>import static</jk> org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
274    *
275    * <jk>public</jk> <jk>void</jk> setValue(Object <jv>value</jv>) {
276    *    <jc>// Validate that value is a String</jc>
277    *    <jsm>assertType</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>, <jv>value</jv>);
278    *    ...
279    * }
280    * </p>
281    *
282    * @param <T> The expected type.
283    * @param type The expected class type.
284    * @param o The object to check.
285    * @return The object cast to the specified type.
286    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Thrown if the object is not an instance of the specified type.
287    */
288   @SuppressWarnings({
289      "unchecked" // Type safety ensured by instanceof check
290   })
291   public static final <T> T assertType(Class<T> type, Object o) throws IllegalArgumentException {
292      assertArgNotNull(ARG_type, type);
293      assertArgNotNull(ARG_o, o);
294      if (! type.isInstance(o))
295         throw illegalArg("Object is not an instance of {0}: {1}", cn(type), cn(o));
296      return (T)o;
297   }
298
299   /**
300    * Throws the exception provided by the supplier if the specified object is not an instance of the specified type.
301    *
302    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
303    * <p class='bjava'>
304    *    <jk>import static</jk> org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
305    *
306    * <jk>public</jk> <jk>void</jk> setValue(Object <jv>value</jv>) {
307    *    <jc>// Validate that value is a String, throw custom exception</jc>
308    *    <jsm>assertType</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>, <jv>value</jv>, () -&gt; <jk>new</jk> IllegalStateException(<js>"Invalid value type"</js>));
309    *    ...
310    * }
311    * </p>
312    *
313    * @param <T> The expected type.
314    * @param type The expected class type.
315    * @param o The object to check.
316    * @param exceptionSupplier The supplier that provides the exception to throw if validation fails.
317    * @return The object cast to the specified type.
318    * @throws RuntimeException Thrown if the object is not an instance of the specified type (the exception is provided by the supplier).
319    */
320   @SuppressWarnings({
321      "unchecked", // Type safety ensured by instanceof check
322      "java:S112"  // Exception type comes from caller's supplier
323   })
324   public static final <T> T assertType(Class<T> type, Object o, java.util.function.Supplier<? extends RuntimeException> exceptionSupplier) {
325      assertArgNotNull(ARG_type, type);
326      assertArgNotNull(ARG_o, o);
327      if (! type.isInstance(o))
328         throw exceptionSupplier.get();
329      return (T)o;
330   }
331
332   /**
333    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if the specified value doesn't have all subclasses of the specified type.
334    *
335    * @param <E> The element type.
336    * @param name The argument name.
337    * @param type The expected parent class.
338    * @param value The array value being checked.
339    * @return The value cast to the specified array type.
340    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Constructed exception.
341    */
342   @SuppressWarnings({
343      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast to Class<E>[] for array validation
344   })
345   public static final <E> Class<E>[] assertClassArrayArgIsType(String name, Class<E> type, Class<?>[] value) throws IllegalArgumentException {
346      for (var i = 0; i < value.length; i++)
347         if (! type.isAssignableFrom(value[i]))
348            throw illegalArg("Arg {0} did not have arg of type {1} at index {2}: {3}", name, cn(type), i, cn(value[i]));
349      return (Class<E>[])value;
350   }
351
352   /**
353    * Throws an {@link AssertionError} if the specified actual value is not one of the expected values.
354    *
355    * @param <T> The value type.
356    * @param actual The actual value.
357    * @param expected The expected values.
358    * @return The actual value if it matches one of the expected values.
359    * @throws AssertionError if the value is not one of the expected values.
360    */
361   @SafeVarargs
362   public static final <T> T assertOneOf(T actual, T...expected) {
363      for (var e : expected) {
364         if (eq(actual, e))
365            return actual;
366      }
367      throw new AssertionError("Invalid value specified: " + actual);
368   }
369
370   /**
371    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if the specified varargs array or any of its elements are <jk>null</jk>.
372    *
373    * @param <T> The element type.
374    * @param name The argument name.
375    * @param o The object to check.
376    * @return The same object.
377    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Thrown if the specified varargs array or any of its elements are <jk>null</jk>.
378    */
379   public static final <T> T[] assertArgNoNulls(String name, T[] o) throws IllegalArgumentException {
380      assertArgNotNull(name, o);
381      for (var i = 0; i < o.length; i++)
382         assertArg(nn(o[i]), "Argument ''{0}'' parameter {1} cannot be null.", name, i);
383      return o;
384   }
385
386   /**
387    * Throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if the specified collection or any of its elements are <jk>null</jk>.
388    *
389    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
390    * <p class='bjava'>
391    *    <jk>import static</jk> org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
392    *
393    * <jk>public</jk> <jk>void</jk> setValues(List&lt;String&gt; <jv>values</jv>) {
394    *    <jsm>assertCollectionArgNotNull</jsm>(<js>"values"</js>, <jv>values</jv>);
395    *    ...
396    * }
397    * </p>
398    *
399    * @param <T> The element type.
400    * @param <C> The collection type.
401    * @param name The argument name.
402    * @param collection The collection to check.
403    * @return The same collection.
404    * @throws IllegalArgumentException Thrown if the specified collection or any of its elements are <jk>null</jk>.
405    */
406   public static final <T, C extends Collection<T>> C assertArgNoNulls(String name, C collection) throws IllegalArgumentException {
407      assertArgNotNull(name, collection);
408      var i = 0;
409      for (var element : collection)
410         assertArg(nn(element), "Argument ''{0}'' element at index {1} cannot be null.", name, i++);
411      return collection;
412   }
413
414}
